This folder has the code and data for VarCall analysis.

To run the code:


1. Download all files to your local folder
2. Run Rtex in R as following: 
  
Open RAD51Dmave25.noPosNorm.ldaErrVarModel.ClinVarExclude.Rtex in Rstudio. choose Knit PDF from the toolbar. 

Note: make sure the relative path is correct.
